extension.title: Copilot Cockpit
config.enabled: Turn scheduled prompt execution on or off
config.autoShowOnStartup: Automatically open the cockpit webview on VS Code startup for this repo. Set this in the repo workspace settings if you want it enabled only here.
config.showNotifications: Display a notification after each task runs
config.language.auto: Detect automatically from VS Code locale
config.timezone: IANA timezone for cron schedules (e.g. 'Europe/Berlin'). Blank uses the OS default.
config.chatSession.new: Create new chat session for each execution
config.defaultAgent: Default agent used when a task, job step, research profile, or test run leaves the agent empty. Set this per repo from the Cockpit Settings tab.
config.defaultModel: Default model used when a task, job step, research profile, or test run leaves the model empty. Set this per repo from the Cockpit Settings tab.
config.needsBotReviewCommentTemplate: Repo-local handoff comment inserted into a Todo thread when the card newly enters needs-bot-review.
config.needsBotReviewPromptTemplate: Repo-local prompt template executed immediately when a Todo newly enters needs-bot-review. Supports {{todo_context}}, {{mcp_skill_guidance}}, {{title}}, {{description}}, {{labels}}, {{recent_comments}}, and {{linked_task}} placeholders.
config.needsBotReviewAgent: Agent used for the immediate needs-bot-review planning run. Configure this per repo from the Cockpit Settings tab.
config.needsBotReviewModel: Model used for the immediate needs-bot-review planning run. Configure this per repo from the Cockpit Settings tab.
config.needsBotReviewChatSession: Chat session behavior used for the immediate needs-bot-review planning run.
config.readyPromptTemplate: Repo-local prompt template used when creating a ready task draft from a Todo. Supports {{todo_context}}, {{mcp_skill_guidance}}, {{title}}, {{description}}, {{labels}}, {{recent_comments}}, and {{linked_task}} placeholders.
config.defaultScope: Default visibility scope for new tasks
config.defaultScope.workspace: Workspace — visible in this workspace only
config.jitterSeconds: Max random delay (seconds) added before a task starts (0 disables jitter). Individual tasks may override.
config.maxDailyExecutions: Daily execution cap across all tasks (0 = no limit, range 1–100). ⚠️ Removing the cap may trigger API rate limits.
config.maxNewChatSessionsPerHour: Hourly cap on newly created chat sessions across all runs (0 = no limit, range 1–100). Continue-mode runs do not count.
config.minimumIntervalWarning: Warn when a cron expression resolves to an interval under 30 minutes
config.globalPromptsPath: Override path for global prompt templates. Leave blank to use the VS Code default: User/prompts (Win: %APPDATA%/Code/User/prompts, Mac: ~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/prompts, Linux: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Code/User/prompts or ~/.config/Code/User/prompts)
config.globalAgentsPath: Override path for global agent definitions (*.agent.md). Leave blank to use the VS Code default: User/prompts (Win: %APPDATA%/Code/User/prompts, Mac: ~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/prompts, Linux: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Code/User/prompts or ~/.config/Code/User/prompts)
config.storageMode: Primary persistence backend for scheduler and cockpit state. Keep this on JSON until the SQLite migration path is fully enabled for the workspace.
config.storageMode.json: Use the existing JSON files in .vscode as the authoritative store
config.storageMode.sqlite: Use the local SQLite database as the authoritative store
config.sqliteJsonMirror: When SQLite storage mode is enabled, also emit compatibility JSON mirrors under .vscode for migration and rollback workflows.
config.deterministicCockpitStateMode: Rollout mode for deterministic Cockpit state routing and reconciliation diagnostics.
config.deterministicCockpitStateMode.off: Use legacy routing signals only and skip deterministic routing enforcement
config.deterministicCockpitStateMode.sha: Keep canonical routing active but log mismatches against legacy-style routing
config.deterministicCockpitStateMode.dua: Keep canonical routing active and emit extra reconciliation logs for migration monitoring
config.deterministicCockpitStateMode.can: Use canonical workflow-flag routing as the primary behavior
config.legacyFallbackOnError: If deterministic routing throws, retry Cockpit routing with legacy signal matching for recovery.
config.reportIssue: 🐛 Found a problem? [Open an issue on GitHub](https://github.com/nicobrinkkemper/copilot-cockpit/issues)
